Bash(python -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);t=d.get\('today',{}\);print\(f'  today.totalSales: \\${t.get\(\\"totalSales\\"\)}'\);print\(f'  today.txCount: {t.get\(\\"transactionCount\\"\)}'\);print\(f'  today.cashSales: \\${t.get\(\\"cashSales\\"\)}'\);print\(f'  topProducts: {[p.get\(\\"name\\"\) for p in d.get\(\\"topProductsToday\\",[]\)[:3]]}'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);print\(f'  status: {d.get\(\\"status\\"\)}'\);print\(f'  expected: \\${d.get\(\\"expectedAmount\\"\)}'\);print\(f'  closing: \\${d.get\(\\"closingAmount\\"\)}'\);print\(f'  variance: \\${d.get\(\\"variance\\"\)}'\);print\(f'  cashSales: \\${d.get\(\\"cashSales\\"\)}'\);print\(f'  cashRefunds: \\${d.get\(\\"cashRefunds\\"\)}'\);print\(f'  drops: \\${d.get\(\\"cashDropsTotal\\"\)}'\);print\(f'  payouts: \\${d.get\(\\"payoutsTotal\\"\)}'\);print\(f'  txCount: {d.get\(\\"transactionCount\\"\)}'\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "process.chdir\('ecom-backend'\); const r = await import\('@storeveu/redis'\); console.log\('redis ok:', Object.keys\(r\)\); const q = await import\('@storeveu/queue/producers'\); console.log\('queue producers ok:', Object.keys\(q\)\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "const r = await import\('@storeveu/redis'\); console.log\('redis:', Object.keys\(r\), 'available=', r.isRedisAvailable\(\)\); const q = await import\('@storeveu/queue/producers'\); console.log\('queue:', Object.keys\(q\)\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "const r = await import\('@storeveu/redis'\); console.log\('redis:', Object.keys\(r\), 'avail=', r.isRedisAvailable\(\), 'client=', r.getRedisClient\(\)\); const q = await import\('@storeveu/queue/producers'\); console.log\('queue producers:', Object.keys\(q\)\); await q.emitProductSync\({test:1}\); console.log\('emitProductSync no-op OK'\);")
Bash(node --input-type=module -e "const m = await import\('./src/server.js'\).catch\(e => \({_err: e.message}\)\); console.log\(m._err || 'imported ok'\);")

Bash(timeout 8 node --input-type=module -e "process.env.NODE_ENV='test'; const m = await import\('./src/server.js'\).catch\(e => \({_err: e.message + '\\n' + e.stack}\)\); console.log\(m._err ? 'IMPORT ERR: ' + m._err : 'imported ok'\);")
